ddls:
CREATE TABLE "grids" (
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid */,
  "grid_name" TEXT /* Name of the grid */,
  "grid_type" TEXT /* Type of the grid (e.g., DGGS, Hexagonal) */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the grid */,
  "cell_area" TEXT /* Cell area of the grid */,
  "intercell_distance" TEXT /* Intercell distance of the grid */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the grid was created */,
  "grid_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the grid */,
  "projection" TEXT /* The geographic projection used for the grid */,
  "extent" TEXT /* The spatial extent of the grid (e.g., bounding box coordinates) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the grid (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who created the grid */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the grid was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the grid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grids_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grids_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_resolution_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., SPECIFIED, CELL_AREA, INTERCELL_DISTANCE) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the value (e.g., meters, kilometers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the resolution specification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who created the specification */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the specification was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the specification was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_resolution_specifications_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_resolution_specifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_generation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid being generated */,
  "resolution_spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution specification used */,
  "rnd_down" INTEGER /* Whether to round down the desired cell area or intercell distance */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the parameter set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who created the parameter set */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the parameter set was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the parameter set was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the parameter set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_generation_parameters_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_generation_parameters_grid_id FOREIGN KEY ("grid_id") REFERENCES grids ("grid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_generation_parameters_resolution_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_spec_id") REFERENCES grid_resolution_specifications ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_generation_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., spatial autocorrelation, nearest neighbor) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the analysis result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who created the analysis result */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the analysis result was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the analysis result was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the analysis result */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* The tool or method used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_analysis_results_grid_id FOREIGN KEY ("grid_id") REFERENCES grids ("grid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_analysis_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_analysis_results_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the grid */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the grid was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client making the request */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* The HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_grid_id FOREIGN KEY ("grid_id") REFERENCES grids ("grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_operations" (
  "op_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid being operated on */,
  "op_type" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., grid generation, analysis) */,
  "op_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the operation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the operation was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the operation (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_operations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_operations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_operations_grid_id FOREIGN KEY ("grid_id") REFERENCES grids ("grid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dggs_apertures" (
  "aperture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aperture sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* DGGS aperture sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the aperture sequence */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who created the aperture sequence */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date the aperture sequence was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the aperture sequence was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the user who last modified the aperture sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aperture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dggs_apertures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dggs_apertures_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
